case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. NEW CONCOURS CARS OF DENVER INC et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $455.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NEW CONCOURS CARS OF DENVER INC KRISTA, SCOTT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-07-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: New Concours Cars of Denver, Inc.; and Scott Krista as follows:
Principal $34,130.15
Prejudgment Interest $607.75
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $455.00, for a total of $37,692.90
Plaintiff is entitled to the immediate possession of the LEASED EQUIPMENT listed in the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
